@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python:12, the agent labeled CHI papers by simply checking if 'CHI' appeared anywhere in each paper's full text (if 'CHI' in text.upper()) before joining on titles with 2020 citations, an overly broad and inaccurate venue-detection implementation that led to mismatches/omissions and an undercount (243) versus the correct 3835.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python:8, after pulling 2020 citations (query_db:0) and paper texts (query_db:2), the agent labeled a paper as CHI if its full text merely contained the substring "CHI", causing inclusion of non-CHI papers and an inflated total (3870) instead of correctly parsing the venue.
B. Failure modes encountered:

FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
